raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year>, I identified several unauthorized charges on my Citi AAdvantage credit card totaling approximately {$10000.00}. Upon further investigation, I learned that an individual named XXXX XXXX, located in XXXX, Nebraska, had been added to my account without my knowledge or consent and was issued a credit card. 

I did not authorize the addition of this individual to my account, nor did I authorize any of the associated transactions. All of these charges are fraudulent. 

I promptly reported the issue to Citi and have disputed the charges multiple times between XXXX and XX/XX/year>. Despite these efforts, the matter remains unresolved, and I continue to be billed for the fraudulent charges. 

Additionally, after Citi canceled several compromised cards, I was sent a replacement card in XX/XX/year> that still bore the unauthorized individuals name, indicating a serious failure in account security and resolution procedures.
